enrichment method: viral particles were collected and enriched by centrifugation
fractionation method: purified on sucrose gradients for various subsequent characterizations
instrument: analyzed by online nanoliquid chromatography coupled to tandem mass spectrometry (MS/MS) (Ultimate 3000 RSLCnano and Q-Exactive HF, Thermo Fisher Scientific)
labeling: Proline was then used to perform an MS1 label-free quantification of the identified protein groups
